reviews.comment:
La primera vez que me atienden tan mal, ni me dieron ganas de quejarme, a los golpes con la manguera contra la carrocería y a los golpes con el pico en la boca del tanque.. un desastre el playero

(Translated by Google)
The first time I've ever been treated so badly, I didn't even feel like complaining. He was banging the hose against the car and hitting the gas tank opening with the nozzle... the gas station attendant was a disaster.
